calendar.matters:
Petition To Authorize Compromise Of Claim Against Estate
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Warren Woo for Daniel Carter (Executor).

Mr. Woo stated that he was not sure if an estate for Margaret was open. With regard to the request for the $2,000.00 reserve, Mr. Woo stated that there was still a dispute with the IRS with regard to late filing of the 2008 returns, that he has challenged the penalties and that it is still being reviewed by the IRS. The Petition to Authorize Compromise of Claim Against Estate and the Accounting Petition were granted (subject to review of the orders). The Court may change language in the order. Status on close of Juan Rivero's estate (287108) was set for June 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Authorize Compromise Of Claim Against Estate
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Continued To Oct-23-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Continued To Oct-23-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Order To Allow Filing Of Late Claim Against Estate
Off Calendar Feb-18-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Mesina for Daniel Carter (Executor). Norman Lew for Victor Chan (Petitioner).

Mr. Mesina stated that he has no objection to allowing filing of the late claim against the Estate. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order To Allow Filing Of Late Claim Against Estate
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Continued To Feb-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
